Expert eLearning design for meaningful impact

We help organizations create engaging, effective online learning experiences.

Contact us See our services

Engaging. Affirming. Accessible.

We develop custom eLearning courses that engage learners with real-world challenges and authentic learning experiences. Our branching scenarios, interactive simulations, and tailored activities are designed specifically for your content and audience using the Articulate Storyline authoring tool. We deliver SCORM-compliant courses ready for seamless LMS integration, equip your team with documentation and training, and provide ongoing support for updates, maintenance, and continuous improvement as your needs evolve.

Our Services

We provide comprehensive eLearning development and instructional design services tailored to your organization.

Instructional Design

Research-based learning design for online and blended environments that prioritizes learner engagement and authentic outcomes.

Custom eLearning Development

We develop custom eLearning courses that engage learners with real-world challenges and authentic learning experiences. Our branching scenarios, interactive simulations, and tailored activities are designed specifically for your content and audience using the Articulate Storyline authoring tool.

Fast-to-Launch, Adaptive eLearning Development

Responsive eLearning courses that reach learners anywhere, on any device, with rapid deployment and consistent experiences using the Articulate Rise authoring tool.

Media Design & Instructional Video

Custom graphics, animations, and instructional videos designed to clarify complex concepts and maintain learner attention.

AI-Facilitated eLearning

AI-powered conversation-based learning experiences that guide users through structured reflection, scenario-based practice, and personalized outputs that can be shared with advisors or used in real-world decision-making.

LMS Administration & Support

Ongoing support for course catalog management, user administration, and platform optimization to keep your learning ecosystem running smoothly.

How We Work

A rigorous, learner-centered process that balances instructional research with the practical realities of your organization and learners.

1

Listen and Learn

We begin by understanding learner context, goals, constraints, and success criteria through interviews with stakeholders and subject matter experts. When relevant, we engage with national experts and review existing materials, research, and instructional context to ground our work in best practices informed by learning theory.

2

Case Studies and Characters

We design realistic case studies and learn-along characters grounded in authentic learner contexts. These scenarios reflect the real decisions, challenges, and trade-offs learners face, establishing narrative structure before we move into detailed interaction design.

3

Storyboarding

We create instructional storyboards that outline interactions, assessments, and the learner's journey. This phase ensures alignment between objectives and activities, helping stakeholders and instructional designers identify potential gaps or challenges before development begins.

4

Development

We build courses with meticulous attention to visual design, user experience, and accessibility. Through thoughtfully crafted scenarios and interactions, we create engaging learning experiences that drive engagement and retention.

5

Review and Iteration

Through structured review cycles, we refine content, interactions, and media based on your feedback. This collaborative process ensures the final product aligns with your vision and the needs of your learners.

6

Launch and Ongoing Support

We deliver SCORM-compliant courses ready for seamless LMS integration, equip your team with documentation and training, and provide ongoing support for updates, maintenance, and continuous improvement as your needs evolve.

Examples of Our Work

A sample of the learning experiences we design and develop for education organizations.

Articulate Rise

Responsive, Accessible PL

Our design team used Articulate Rise to create an eLearning module that employs embedded PDF graphics and accessible PDF worksheets designed to address efficacy and develop a culture of math leadership.

AI-Facilitated eLearning

Value Proposition AI Coach

This Storyline module features an embedded AI coach that guides cross-sector leaders in refining their organization's value proposition within place-based partnerships.

Chat-Based Learning

Career Ikigai — Personalized Pathway Tool

Career Ikigai is a chat-based learning experience that guides users through a structured interview to surface interests, strengths, and goals. The system synthesizes responses into personalized pathways, actionable next steps, and a formatted slide output that can be edited and shared with advisors or mentors. Designed for use in counseling, advising, and workforce programs, it can connect to localized job market data and support cohort-level insights through shared outputs and dashboards.

Learning Game

Learning Games

The "Smoothie Challenge" is an interactive game designed and developed by Integral Ed. Participants select ingredients to make healthy smoothies that meet specific criteria — showcasing our ability to create engaging learning experiences for all ages.

Ready to get started?

Tell us about your project and we'll share examples of our work relevant to your needs.

Talk with our team

eLearning & Blended Learning

eLearning & Blended Learning is a division of Integral Ed Services, an educator-led learning and media design firm for mission-driven organizations. Adding technical and strategic capacity to schools, nonprofits, and workforce organizations since 2011.
